title: Sichuan Pepper Garlic Rice
description: A creamy garlic rice dish infused with the bold flavors of Sichuan pepper, perfect for a hearty meal that's both savory and comforting.
instructions: Rinse the rice and cook according to package instructions.
Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat, add garlic cloves and chopped scallions. Sauté for about 2 minutes until fragrant.
Add rinsed rice to the pan with the garlic mixture. Stir well to coat the grains evenly.
Pour coconut milk into the pan and stir until all ingredients are fully combined.
Add Sichuan peppercorns, cover the pan, and simmer on low heat for about 10 minutes or until the liquid is absorbed.
Turn off heat and let sit for another 5 minutes before serving.
